source: TSB SB-25-01-001: Air Suspension Compressor Noise
content:
{
  "id": "SB-25-01-001",
  "title": "Air Suspension Compressor Noise",
  "issue": "Loud compressor operation during height adjustment",

    "Compressor runs frequently",
    "Hissing sounds"
  ],
  "fix": "Replace compressor, update firmware",
  "parts": [

    "1130040-00-A"
  ],
  "labor_hours": 3.0,
  "years": [
    "2024",
    "2025",
    "2026"
  ]
}
